title: To give the force and effect of law to the Executive Order issued on March 6, 2025 entitled "Establishment of the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and United States Digital Asset Stockpile".
plain_summary: This bill turns a Presidential order from March 2025 into a real law. The order created a special government savings account for Bitcoin and other digital money. Before this bill, the President's order was just a rule that could be easily changed. Now that Congress is making it a law, it will be much harder to change or get rid of. This means the US government will officially collect and store Bitcoin and other digital currencies.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.

sections.title: Section 1 Establishment of the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and United States Digital Asset Stockpile
sections.text: The Executive Order that the President signed on March sixth, two thousand twenty five called Establishment of the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and United States Digital Asset Stockpile will now have the same power as a law passed by Congress. This means the Executive Order must be followed just like any other federal law.
